_comment: Runtime settings for the plugin. API key is stored in macOS Keychain (api_key_saved is a flag only). PTT is bound via X-Plane command binding. Models and voice can be changed to any supported OpenAI variant. Volume range is 0.0–1.0. active_com selects which COM radio (1 or 2) the plugin monitors.
pilot_callsign: November One Two Three Alpha Bravo
